personality_one_liner: A sleek, command-center diagnostic interface that turns mechanical data into authoritative, high-contrast visual analytics.

spacing.rule: Handle spacing tightly for a command-center feel. Use md for main padding, sm between dense metrics. Ensure hit areas are 44pt.

do's: Use solid surfaceSecondary and dividers for high-information density clarity instead of blur
dont's: Do not use blur on dashboards or dev-tool like dense data screens

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Log in or register for an account.

states.loading: Spinner over carbon fiber texture background.
states.error: Toast with readable red text over surfaceSecondary.

screens.layout: Hero image of cinematic dark sports car with top-down gradient scrim. Single-column input fields with floating labels above. Primary CTA sticky at bottom of KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Home / Search
screens.purpose: Select Marka (Brand), Model, and Yıl (Year) to generate an AI analysis.

states.empty: Illustrative engine prompt: 'Analiz edilecek aracı seçin'.
states.error: Araç bulunamadı (Car not found) message with retry button.

screens.layout: Stacked modular layout. Large display typography for 'OtoEkspertiz AI'. Segmented controls or solid input fields for Brand, Model, Year selection. Search button large, brandPrimary, sticky at bottom.

screens.name: Analysis Report
screens.purpose: Detailed AI diagnostic report with scores, chronic issues, fuel, and costs.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders mimicking stat bars and progress rings.
states.error: Analiz başarısız (Analysis failed) with retry button.

screens.layout: Live operational surface. Hero banner using car engine image with vertical gradient scrim. Dynamic 'Araç Güven Skoru' (Vehicle Trust Score) using large Barlow Condensed font. Collapsible cards with traffic-light indicators (success/warning/error) for Mekanik, Elektrik, Kaporta. Modular stat bars for yakıt tüketimi (fuel) and piyasa fiyatı (market price). Sticky CTA to 'Favorilere Ekle' or 'Karşılaştır'.

screens.name: Compare (Karşılaştırma)

states.empty: Split layout asking to '2. Aracı Seçin' (Select 2nd car).

screens.layout: Split-panel layout. Two columns side-by-side with synchronized scrolling. Use dividers over shadows. Large numerical comparison highlighting the 'winner' of each spec (yakıt, fiyat, bakım maliyeti) using success colors.

screens.name: Favorites / History
screens.purpose: List of previously analyzed and saved vehicles.

states.empty: Icon of a garage + 'Henüz araç kaydetmediniz' + primary CTA to Search.

screens.layout: Single column card list. Each card has a subtle brandTertiary tint with the car's model/year and its Trust Score prominently displayed. Swipe-to-delete gesture.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: User settings, account info, and logout.
screens.layout: List of settings rows. Each row uses a tinted icon container (brandTertiary rounded square). Clean, functional typography.

hero_sports_car.alt: Luxury sports car in shadows of a modern garage space

hero_engine_mechanics.alt: Vehicle engine bay closeup in dark lighting

background_texture.alt: Dark carbon fiber texture for deep backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the NO BLUES color rule. Use the defined Ember Red (#E63946) and Warning Amber (#F4A261) for accents.
Implement the UI as a Dark-First Utility (Personality 7) concept: prioritize fast scanning, hard dividers over shadows, and large condensed typography (Barlow Condensed) for data/scores.
Text weights must never exceed 500. Use font sizes to establish hierarchy instead of bold text.
Every image used as a background MUST have a top-down vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse) to guarantee text contrast. Ensure opacity reaches at least 70% at the text level.
Ensure safe area is strictly respected at screen roots. No content should hide beneath notches or home indicators.
The Compare screen must use a split-panel layout (two parallel columns) for direct visual contrast of metrics. Make sure the winning metric stands out using the success color.
For the Analysis Report, structure the chronic issues into clear traffic-light indicator cards (green/yellow/red) based on severity, rather than text-heavy paragraphs.
Maintain the Turkish UI language across all static texts, placeholders, and buttons as per the problem statement.
